channel.title: Wireless on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Wireless on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Network Access
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Switching" , "VLANs" , "Spanning Tree" , "Wireless" , "Cisco Certification" , "Network Access" , "EtherChannel" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master network access for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn VLANs, trunking, EtherChannel, Rapid PVST+ spanning tree, discovery protocols, and Cisco wireless architectures.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Network Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Fundamentals" , "Switching" , "IP Addressing" , "Wireless" , "Cisco Certification" , "Routing and Switching" , "Network Architecture" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master network fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn network components, topologies, cabling, TCP and UDP, IPv4 and IPv6 addressing, wireless principles, and switching concepts.

item.title: Cisco CCNA Course: Complete Study Guide for the 200-301 Exam
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking Certification" , "Network Fundamentals" , "Routing and Switching" , "Network Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "IP Connectivity" , "Network Automation" , "Wireless Networking" , "IT Networking"
item.description: A comprehensive Cisco CCNA (200-301) study course covering network fundamentals, network access, IP connectivity, IP services, security fundamentals, and automation and programmability.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Networking Fundamentals
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Networking" , "TCP/IP" , "Wireless Networking" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Network Hardware" , "SOHO Networks" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master networking for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn TCP and UDP ports, wireless technologies, networked host services, network hardware, SOHO configuration, and tools.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.
